name: token-deployer-mcp-server
description: Deploy and manage tokens on Base via the OBSD LaunchPad. Launch tokens with bonding curves, trade, claim creator fees, scan token security, view trending tokens on DexScreener.
author: thryx

RPC_URL.description: Base RPC endpoint (optional, defaults to https://mainnet.base.org)

DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY.description: Private key for write operations (launch, buy, sell, claim)
